name: First Cash Pawn
description_short: FirstCash is the leading international operator of pawn stores with 3,300+ locations across the U.S., Latin America, and the UK, offering pawn loans secured by personal property and retail merchandise sales.
description_long:
FirstCash, Inc. is headquartered in Fort Worth, Texas and operates as the leading international pawn store chain with over 3,300 retail locations spanning 29 U.S. states, Washington D.C., the United Kingdom, and Latin America (including all Mexican states plus Guatemala, Colombia, and El Salvador). The company employs approximately 22,000 people and is listed in both the Standard & Poor's MidCap 400 Index and Russell 2000 Index, indicating its scale as a publicly traded mid-cap company.

FirstCash's core business focuses on serving cash and credit-constrained consumers through two primary service lines: (1) retail pawn operations that buy and sell a wide variety of merchandise including jewelry, electronics, tools, appliances, sporting goods, and musical instruments, and (2) small non-recourse pawn loans secured by pledged personal property. The company also operates layaway services with 10% down payment options and buys precious metals (gold, silver, platinum) for immediate cash. Through its wholly-owned subsidiary AFF, FirstCash provides lease-to-own and retail finance payment solutions across a network of over 15,000 retail merchant partner locations nationwide.

What distinguishes FirstCash from smaller pawn operators is its massive geographic footprint and scale—with over 3,300 locations, it offers consistent service across multiple countries and regions. The company's integration of technology-driven point-of-sale payment solutions and its expansion into lease-to-own financing through AFF positions it as more than a traditional pawn shop chain. The breadth of merchandise categories they purchase and sell, combined with layaway options, provides multiple pathways for consumers to access cash or acquire goods.

For consumers, FirstCash represents an accessible option for fast cash loans backed by personal property without credit checks, and a marketplace to sell items quickly for cash. However, pawn loans involve surrendering collateral, and the retail merchandise prices may not always be competitive with other secondhand markets. The non-recourse nature of pawn loans means default results in loss of the pledged item rather than debt collection, which can be both beneficial and risky depending on the item's value.
pros: 3,300+ locations across 29 U.S. states, DC, UK, and Latin America for broad accessibility
Fast, non-recourse pawn loans secured by personal property require no credit check
Wide variety of merchandise purchased and sold (jewelry, electronics, tools, appliances, instruments, sporting goods)
Buys precious metals (gold, silver, platinum) with same-day cash payment
Convenient layaway service with affordable 10% down payment option
Lease-to-own and retail finance solutions through 15,000+ partner merchant locations via AFF subsidiary
Publicly traded company with institutional backing (S&P MidCap 400 and Russell 2000 indices)
cons: Pawn loans require surrendering collateral—defaulting means permanent loss of the pledged item
Interest rates on pawn loans are not disclosed on the website, making comparison shopping difficult
Retail merchandise prices may not be competitive compared to online secondhand marketplaces or specialty retailers
Non-recourse nature means no legal recourse for consumers if pledged items are lost or damaged while in custody
Limited transparency about loan terms, redemption periods, and fees on the public website
best_for: Cash-constrained consumers who need fast short-term loans without credit checks
People with valuable items (electronics, jewelry, instruments, tools) willing to pledge collateral for immediate cash
Sellers looking to quickly liquidate used merchandise for cash on the spot
Individuals seeking to buy secondhand merchandise at discount prices
diagnosis: FirstCash is best for consumers needing immediate cash who have valuable personal property to pledge, or those seeking to buy or sell secondhand goods quickly. The main caveat is that pawn loans require surrendering collateral with no credit-building benefit, and loan terms and interest rates should be carefully reviewed before pledging valuable items.
services: Pawn loans secured by personal property (non-recourse)
Retail sales of bought merchandise (jewelry, electronics, tools, appliances, sporting goods, musical instruments)
Gold, silver, and platinum buying with same-day cash payment
Layaway service with 10% down payment plans
Store locator tool to find nearest FirstCash location
Lease-to-own financing through AFF subsidiary and 15,000+ merchant partners
Merchandise buying service (pays cash on the spot)
Consumer lending focused on cash and credit-constrained populations
